creator: bremner@unb.ca
text:
I am embarrassed. I discovered a bug in my port.  When I moved things
from /usr/X11R6 to /usr/local, I forgot to update the app-defaults file.

Appended is the whole port


Fix:

begin 644 portipe.tar.gz
